TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lalumaang Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Lalumaang a niyaro', 204 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 542 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 39% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 214 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 61% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 328 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 26%, Bunun 1%, Tayal 1%, Truku 7%, Kebalan 2%, Paiwan 1%, roma 2%.
S.PHON: ɾaɾo~u~umaaŋ itiniaj i xinʦħəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ɾaɾo~u~umaaŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, kəb~b~vaɾan *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Lalumaang Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Lalumaang a niyaro', 204 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 542 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 39% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 214 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 61% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 328 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 26%, Bunun 1%, Tayal 1%, Truku 7%, Kebalan 2%, Paiwan 1%, roma 2%.
S.PHON: ɾaɾo~u~umaaŋ itiniaj i xinʦħəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ɾaɾo~u~umaaŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, kəb~b~vaɾan *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%.
